creator: felix.dietrich+freebsd-bugtracker@sperrhaken.name
text:
Hello,

I was unable to repeat your problem with FreeBSD releases 10.1, 11.1, and 12.4.  Because the reproducing file linked to by Enji in comment #0 does not appear to still exist on GitHub under the URL provided, I searched for the commit hash on GitHub [1] and used another repository I found [2].

Can this report be closed?


[1] <https://github.com/search?q=cfc6ad9bc622f4196577ecf38575ca78dfe5c005&type=Commits>
[2] <https://github.com/ramosaurio/freebsd-rpi4-boot/raw/cfc6ad9bc622f4196577ecf38575ca78dfe5c005/etc/mtree/BSD.tests.dist>
